title: Le Moyne women’s lacrosse knocks off FDU on Senior Day
summary: Le Moyne College women's lacrosse team defeated FDU 11-7 on Senior Day, clinching an NEC Tournament berth. This article reports on a local higher education institution's athletic achievement and has no direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations or the Chief Innovation Officer's mandate.
